name: Productive labor share of employment (Shaikh-Tonak classification)
units: percent of total nonfarm payroll employment
formula: 100 * (USMINE + USCONS + MANEMP + (USTPU - USTRADE - USWTRADE)) / PAYEMS, annual mean of monthly CES employment
classification_note: CONSTRUCTED CLASSIFICATION - heterodox (Shaikh-Tonak), NOT an official BLS series. Productive = mining, construction, manufacturing, and the transport/warehousing/utilities part of CES Trade-Transportation-Utilities. Judgment calls: Information and Professional & Business Services assigned unproductive; agriculture excluded (not in CES nonfarm). See PRODUCTIVE_UNPRODUCTIVE_DPR_EPR.md.

name: Unproductive labor share of employment (Shaikh-Tonak classification)
units: percent of total nonfarm payroll employment
formula: 100 * (USWTRADE + USTRADE + USFIRE + USPBS + USEHS + USLAH + USSERV + USINFO + CES9091000001 + CES9092000001 + CES9093000001) / PAYEMS, annual mean of monthly CES employment
classification_note: CONSTRUCTED CLASSIFICATION - heterodox (Shaikh-Tonak), NOT an official BLS series. Unproductive = wholesale+retail trade, FIRE, professional & business services, education & health, leisure & hospitality, other services, information, and all government. See PRODUCTIVE_UNPRODUCTIVE_DPR_EPR.md.

name: Productive labor employment (Shaikh-Tonak classification)
formula: USMINE + USCONS + MANEMP + (USTPU - USTRADE - USWTRADE), annual mean of monthly CES employment (thousands)
classification_note: CONSTRUCTED CLASSIFICATION - heterodox (Shaikh-Tonak), NOT an official BLS series. See PRODUCTIVE_UNPRODUCTIVE_DPR_EPR.md.

name: Unproductive labor employment (Shaikh-Tonak classification)
formula: USWTRADE + USTRADE + USFIRE + USPBS + USEHS + USLAH + USSERV + USINFO + CES9091000001 + CES9092000001 + CES9093000001, annual mean of monthly CES employment (thousands)
classification_note: CONSTRUCTED CLASSIFICATION - heterodox (Shaikh-Tonak), NOT an official BLS series. See PRODUCTIVE_UNPRODUCTIVE_DPR_EPR.md.
